tasks.title: Prepare richer prune and release workflow implementation slice
tasks.summary: Extend prune release workflow beyond read-only review with approval lifecycle and release readiness gates.
notes: Implemented today: `prune --dry-run`, `prune approve`, `prune review`, `prune --apply`, approval inventory, receipts, and stale/expired/consumed/blocked approval classification exist.
Remaining closure after T-001 was approval lifecycle mutation, broader release readiness gates, and receipt comparison.
Non-goal: approval bypass or physical pruning changes without existing apply gates.

tasks.title: Complete richer prune release workflow closure
tasks.summary: Complete prune release closure with approval inventory, supersede mutation, receipt comparison, compact readiness counts, and honest docs while keeping target mutation behind existing apply gates.
notes: Implemented: `prune approvals` read-only inventory, `prune supersede` durable approval mutation, receipt-linked approval states, and compact status prune review status/action plus readiness counts.
Keeps supersede mutation separate from physical prune apply; `prune --apply --approval <id>` remains the only target-deleting path.
Do not bypass existing dry-run/apply approval gates.
